expectations.text: Output contains an explicit rating on a defined scale
expectations.evidence: 'Rating: 4/5 — Good fit, minor gaps to validate' — clean, no scale table
7 strengths, each one line with evidence
3 gaps, each one line, all tagged Unknown

expectations.text: Risks section exists and is distinct from bias flags

expectations.text: Includes a scoring rubric for the call
Questions target actual unknowns, not proxy credentials
expectations.evidence: Q1: ambiguity, Q2: design reasoning, Q3: engineer collab, Q4: learning agility, Q5: scrappy scenario, Q6: unique perspective, Q7: ego resilience

expectations.text: Explicitly flags 'no US/EU experience' as potential bias

expectations.text: Explicitly flags 'self-taught / no degree' as potential bias
